'''zadadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arabidopsis|arabidopsis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-d-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arabidopsis|arabidopsis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zadadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || zædædhæth || zædædhæj || zædædhæsh || zædædhæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || zadadadhath || zadadadhaj || zadadadhash || zadadadha
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || zadadhath || zadadhaj || zadadhash || zadadha
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || zadafdhafth || zadafdhafj || zadafdhafsh || zadafdhaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || zadadhatha || zadadhaja || zadadhasha || zadadhaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || zadadhath || zadadhaj || zadadhash || zadadha
|-
| [[Possessive]] || zadadhathal || zadadhajal || zadadhashal || zadadhakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || zadadhaathatha || zadadhaajaja || zadadhaashasha || zadadhaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || zadadhathan || zadadhajan || zadadhashan || zadadhakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || zadadhathaoro || zadadhajaoro || zadadhashaoro || zadadhakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
